author: Alex Ibarra
name: Seq2048
blurb: Longer training context (TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048, EVAL_SEQ_LEN=2048) improves val_bpb by learning real long-range dependencies instead of relying on RoPE extrapolation. No architecture changes — same 9-layer 512-dim baseline with relu^2 MLP, only training and eval at 2048 sequence length.
